summary: Tested navbar live search overlay and product detail page shipping info removal. All 6 test scenarios passed.

test_results.search_single_word_fren: PASS - Typing 'fren' shows 7 results with thumbnail, name, price (data-testid=search-result-0 etc.)
test_results.search_multi_word_yamaha_fren: PASS - 'yamaha fren' returns Yamaha-branded fren products
test_results.shipping_info_cards_removed: PASS - Hızlı Kargo / 30 Gün İade / Orijinal Kalite / Teknik Destek cards NOT present on product detail page
test_results.esc_closes_overlay: PASS - ESC key closes the search overlay

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navbar live search fully working: overlay opens on magnifier click, debounce 260ms, results show thumbnail+name+price, multi-word AND search works, ESC closes overlay, clicking result navigates to product page. Product detail page shipping info cards (SHIPPING_INFO) successfully removed.
